title: vaccinium stapfianum
intro: Vaccinium stapfianum, also known as the Stapf's bilberry or Alpine blueberry, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The health benefits of Vaccinium stapfianum include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect against cell damage and improve cardiovascular health. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in the production of jams and preserves.
